# CALM — Coding Agent Liveness Map

> An MCP server that gives coding agents a call-graph-aware, hash-verified
> view of a codebase instead of grep-and-hope: locate/source/edit_symbol/
> diff_impact and 22 tools total, backed by a multi-tier resolver
> (syntactic -> Stack Graphs -> SCIP). Rust binary, runs as an MCP server
> over stdio. Repository: https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM

## Install (pick one)

- npm, no toolchain needed — add to any MCP client's stdio config:
  `{"command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@eilodon/calm-mcp", "serve"]}`
- curl installer (Linux x86_64/aarch64, macOS Apple Silicon):
  `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Eilodon/CALM/main/scripts/install.sh | sh`
  then run `calm setup` inside the target project.
- Claude Code plugin: `/plugin marketplace add Eilodon/CALM` then
  `/plugin install calm@CALM`.
- Clone this repo and use `scripts/mcp-launcher.sh` directly — see
  docs/mcp-client-setup.md.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM/blob/main/README.md): quick
  start, the 22 MCP tools, architecture, benchmarks.
- [docs/mcp-client-setup.md](https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM/blob/main/docs/mcp-client-setup.md):
  wiring CALM into Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, JetBrains, Codex
  CLI, Antigravity (Vietnamese).
- [docs/comparison.md](https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM/blob/main/docs/comparison.md):
  positioning against other code-graph MCP servers.
- [npm/README.md](https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM/blob/main/npm/README.md):
  publishing/verifying the `@eilodon/calm-mcp` npm packages.

## Optional

- [docs/adr/](https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM/tree/main/docs/adr): architecture
  decision records (Stack Graphs scope, formal-resolver approach).
- [benchmarks/](https://github.com/Eilodon/CALM/tree/main/benchmarks): the
  measurement suite behind every number in the README, good and bad numbers
  both reported on purpose.
